query:
SELECT 
  segment,
  COUNT(*) as unsent,
  ROUND(AVG(totalVisits), 1) as avg_visits,
  MIN(lastVisitDate) as oldest_visit,
  MAX(lastVisitDate) as newest_visit
FROM customers
WHERE smsCampaignSent = 0
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY FIELD(segment, 'recent', 'lapsed', 'unknown');

  COUNT(*) as unsent,
  ROUND(AVG(totalVisits), 1) as avg_visits,
  MIN(lastVisitDate) as oldest_visit,
  MAX(lastVisitDate) as newest_visit

GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY FIELD(segment, 'recent', 'lapsed', 'unknown');
